Full Service Offering

Every type of SEO content your business needs.

I don't write generic articles and hope for the best. Every deliverable is built around your specific industry, buyer journey, keyword cluster, and search intent — the way Google's quality raters actually evaluate content.

📍
Local SEO Content
Dominate "near me" searches in your city. I write city landing pages, service-area content, Google Business Profile posts, and local FAQ content that brings foot traffic, calls, and bookings from people already searching for what you offer.
GBP OptimizationCity Landing PagesNear-Me ContentLocal FAQReview Templates
✍️
Website SEO Copywriting
Your homepage and service pages are your most visited real estate. I write conversion-focused, keyword-optimized copy that speaks directly to your ideal client — not generic filler text that sounds like every other website in your industry.
Homepage CopyService PagesLanding PagesSales PagesCTA Optimization
📝
Blog & Authority Content
Long-form SEO articles that rank and actually get read. I research, structure, and write content that answers your audience's real questions — building topical authority that compounds over time and attracts organic traffic month after month.
Long-Form SEO BlogsHealthcare ArticlesLegal ContentThought Leadership
🏥
Healthcare & Medical SEO
As a licensed pharmacist with peer-reviewed publications, I write health content that meets Google's E-E-A-T standards — treatment pages, condition guides, patient FAQs, and clinic location pages that rank and build trust simultaneously.
Treatment PagesE-E-A-T OptimizedMedical BlogsPatient FAQsHIPAA-Conscious
🛒
E-Commerce SEO Content
Product pages, category copy, and buying guides that convert browsers into buyers. I write Shopify and WooCommerce content that ranks for high-intent commercial searches and reduces cart abandonment through benefit-driven language.
Product DescriptionsCategory PagesBuying GuidesShopify SEO
🔧
Technical SEO + Strategy
Beyond writing — I audit your full content ecosystem. Identify thin pages, map internal link architecture, write meta titles and descriptions, plan keyword clusters, and deliver a 90-day SEO roadmap built around your growth goals.
Full SEO AuditKeyword Cluster PlanningContent Refresh90-Day Roadmap

Healthcare · Local SEO · AI Visibility
Quality Dentistry of Coconut Creek, FL

A Florida dental practice with strong clinical reputation but zero digital presence. I built a full-stack local SEO strategy: GBP optimization, city-targeted content, AI search visibility structure, and review generation templates. Within one billing cycle year-over-year, the results were undeniable — the clinic became the #1 result in AI search tools across 6 platforms.

📚 Peer-Reviewed Research Publications

Published in indexed journals with impact factors up to 6.2, including PubMed, PLOS ONE, and Chemico-Biological Interactions. This research background is what enables medical writing that meets Google's E-E-A-T standards at the highest level.

About Me
Andleeb Asghar
Pharmacist. Researcher. SEO Strategist.

I'm Andy — a licensed Doctor of Pharmacy and pharmaceutical chemistry researcher who built a second career in SEO. That scientific background isn't a footnote. It's the reason my healthcare and medical content outperforms what most writers can produce: I understand mechanisms, clinical data, and complex topics at a depth that most content writers simply don't have access to.

As an Expert Vetted (Top 1%) and Top Rated Plus freelancer on Upwork, I've delivered 200+ SEO-optimized articles, technical audits, and content strategies for clients including Lockheed Martin, UCLA Medical Center, Medical Consumer Products, Dr. Hemp Me, California Medical, and Rolstoel.

My work has been published on PubMed, PLOS ONE (impact factors 2.6–6.2), Ness Lab, Grants for Medical, and 10+ peer-reviewed journals. These aren't just credentials to list. They're the E-E-A-T signals that Google rewards with rankings — and competitors can't fake.

Every article I write is 100% human-written, rigorously researched, and built to earn rankings, trust, and conversions. Not just word count on a page.
